problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
mechanism: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering
hypothesis: The key to What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants? is Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering — specifically Electrospun nanofiber scaffold — which would help 700,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
